programs.title: Ustadon Ke Ustad
programs.desc: Vishwanath and Jaikishan are two thieves and good friends. When they try to lead an honest life for the sake of their women, Pukhraj turns them against each other and the two become sworn enemies.

programs.title: Waqt Ki Deewar
programs.desc: Two brothers are separated after their mother is raped and commits suicide. One turns into a criminal and he unknowingly works for the same rapist, whereas the other becomes a policeman.

programs.title: Pakhandi
programs.desc: Circumstances separate two brothers in their childhood. However, they reunite in their adulthood after a series of events.

programs.title: Pratigyabadh
programs.desc: Shankar grows up to become the right hand man of a gangster. His goal in life is to take revenge on the moneylender who left his family homeless and a truck driver who molested and killed his mother.

programs.title: Zamana
programs.desc: Ravi and Vinod's father is killed by a gangster for developing a photo that depicts a crime scene. Ravi, a criminal, and Vinod, a police officer, decide to exact revenge on their father's murderer.

programs.title: Be-Reham
programs.desc: Kumar Anand, an honest police officer, gets into trouble after he accidentally kills a gangster at his ex-lover Mala's house.
